item.title: Putin says remark on Ukraine war coming to an end was based...
item.description: Putin says remark on Ukraine war coming to an end was based on battlefield advances  ReutersUkraine war live: Putin denies blame for Romania drone hit and says conflict near end  The IndependentPutin Claims Russia’s Full-Scale Invasion Nears End Without Providing Timeline  UNITED24 MediaRussian President Putin Addresses Victory Day Parade, Reaffirms Confidence in Russia’s Ukraine War Stance  NewsonairPutin reiterates claim that war is nearing its end but refuses to give timeline  Українська правда
